name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf is an indoor golf simulator venue that combines Trackman technology with a full-service bar and social atmosphere. They feature state-of-the-art golf simulator bays equipped with Trackman launch monitors and high-speed cameras, providing access to 200+ virtual golf courses. The venue is accessible with a no-dress-code policy and offers amenities like a full-service bar, chef-inspired menu, and a lively social space. Pricing for bay rental varies by location, day, and time, with membership options available for frequent players.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology provides accurate swing and ball data
Wide variety of 200+ virtual courses, including PGA Tour venues
Full-service bar and food menu enhance the social experience
Flexible booking options with walk-in availability

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service bar with chef-inspired menu, including deals like $5 and $10 wings and half-priced pizzas during happy hour
Full-service bar with drink specials, including $5 shots during 5i After Dark

simulator_hardware.notes: Custom-built simulators with dual-radar Trackman technology providing accurate data on ball flight, spin rate, swing speed, and more

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, the venue provides equipment, though bringing your own clubs is also an option.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted as the venue features a full-service bar and kitchen.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Time varies depending on group size and pace, but the 5-hour game time bay rental option accommodates up to 8 people.

faq.question: Is Five Iron Golf kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue offers junior clinics and kids' party packages, making it suitable for families.
